channel.title: PROJECT PRICE LIVE VIDEO
channel.description: Realtor and Homebuyer Property Estimate Strategy Videos

item.title: Inspection surprise: foundation settling in a older brick home
item.description: House-hunting tip: factor foundation settling in before making your offer. Use Project Price to compare repair costs, plan a seller credit, and stop overpaying. #ProjectPrice #AIEstimate #RealEstateTools #ConstructionCost #HouseHunting #HomeRepair #StopOverpaying

item.title: Time-pressure decision: hvac replacement in a move-in-ready listing
item.description: Quick reality check: hvac replacement can cost more than expected. Use Project Price to compare repair costs, plan a offer reduction, and stop overpaying. #ProjectPrice #AIEstimate #RealEstateTools #ConstructionCost #HouseHunting #HomeRepair #StopOverpaying

item.title: Deal saver: panel and wiring corrections in a recently flipped home
item.description: Before you buy: panel and wiring corrections can wreck your budget quickly. Use Project Price to compare repair costs, plan a seller-completed repairs, and stop overpaying. #ProjectPrice #AIEstimate #RealEstateTools #ConstructionCost #HouseHunting #HomeRepair #PropTech

item.title: Budget reality check: kitchen cabinet and counter refresh in a cosmetic fixer-upper
item.description: House-hunting tip: factor kitchen cabinet and counter refresh in before making your offer. Use Project Price to compare repair costs, plan a phased post-close plan, and stop overpaying. #ProjectPrice #AIEstimate #RealEstateTools #ConstructionCost #FirstTimeHomeBuyer #HouseHunting #StopOverpaying

item.title: Deal saver: panel and wiring corrections in a recently flipped home
item.description: Buyer warning: Deal saver: panel and wiring corrections in a recently flipped home can blow up a deal fast. Use Project Price to compare repair costs, negotiate smarter, and stop overpaying. #ProjectPrice #AIEstimate #RealEstateTools #ConstructionCost #HouseHunting #HomeRepair #LifeHacks
